summary: Comprehensive frontend-only Playwright testing of Logicense marketing site (8 pages + 404). Verified home hero (asymmetric layout w/ terminal), all nav routes, sticky header + logo return, header/hero book-a-call CTAs, theme toggle (dark default -> light -> dark), mobile hamburger menu at 768px, /services (4 terminals), /industries (7 rows), /process (5 steps + Deliverables), /work (3 placeholder cards + TODO badges + notice), /technology (agent-loop diagram + 8 stack tiles + eval terminal), /about (6 principles + team placeholder notice + 3 team cards), /contact validation (empty, invalid email, short message) + success path (toast + form clear), footer (12 test-ids incl. sitemap + email + socials), and 404 with home link. Muted-blue accent verified: rgb(73,138,243).
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form is intentionally dummy per spec — success toast text explicitly notes 'not yet wired to a backend'. Recommend wiring to a backend/email service before launch.
SITE.bookACall, social URLs, and team/case-study copy contain TODO/[PLACEHOLDER] markers that must be replaced before public launch (this is by design and clearly flagged in UI notices).
next-themes: theme flash prevention could be improved via a suppressHydrationWarning + <script> in index.html, but dark defaultTheme + attribute='class' works as intended in tests.
No data-testid on hero terminal specifically, but Terminal component already exposes data-testid='terminal-block' (>=1 present on home).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React SPA at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All required data-testid attributes are present and correct. Contact form is dummy (client-side setTimeout w/ sonner toast). Accent CSS var --lg-accent resolves to a muted blue (rgb(73,138,243)) — matches spec. Placeholder [PLACEHOLDER] blocks on /work and /about render visibly with TODO badges/notices as required.
